name: The Smurfs 2021
description:
Smurfette, Hefty, Clumsy, and Brainy got captured by Gargamel! (Again...) But you also got captured! Because of them... So you are another Smurf, any village you choose, fanon or canon. You were put in a seperate cage in Gargamel's tower!
